message: WMI-1 shared-state divergence (signal-set-unchecked): 'dir_emit_dots' sets signal field 'dir_context.pos', which a different component branches on to reinterpret the object — a candidate ungoverned signal. [mechanism:unchecked-signal-field-set;indicates=WMI-1] [mem:struct=dir_context;field=pos;offset=8] [oracle:assert=dir_context.pos stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs;assume=producer sets pos without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant]
